title: Review run record
description: One review execution: a single rubric judged once on a single PR head by a single model. The core A/B-comparison unit.

dedupe_key.description: repo|pr|head_sha|rubric|model|rubrics_version|arm|round — for reconciling the same execution reaching the archive via different sources (live, ledger import, scrape)

prompt_policy.description: reactivation runs carry the prior case file and author replies into the prompt; only compare runs with matching policy

base_ref_oid.description: the PR base branch tip — NOT necessarily the merge base

merge_base_sha.description: the actual left side of the reviewed three-dot diff

rubrics_sha.description: git commit of the rubrics+engine checkout that ran

rubrics_version.description: content hash of the rubric files (review.py rubrics_fingerprint)

diff_sha256.description: sha256 of the full reviewed diff text

diff_prompt_sha256.description: sha256 of the (possibly truncated) diff in the prompt; present only when truncated

attempts.description: per provider call: returncode, cost_usd, usage, secs, parse_error — every attempt, not just the accepted one

cost_usd_legacy.description: the pre-recost cost_usd, retained when this record was recosted against a fixed price table

cost_recosted.description: true when cost_usd was recomputed from usage against a pinned price table (see prices_sha); cost_usd_legacy holds the original

prices_sha.description: content hash of the price table used for recosting; null when the recost predates price-table pinning

transcript_blob.description: sha256 key into blobs/ for the reviewer's final text (redacted, gzipped)

diff_blob.description: sha256 key into blobs/ for the full reviewed diff (gzipped)

fidelity.description: exact: written at execution time; reconstructed: backfilled with best-effort recovery of base/diff; scoreboard-parse: parsed from a rendered comment body. Only exact records belong in strict A/B cohorts
